dialogue: Attention, everyone. We have a location.
I will open the communication channels.
That gives the enemy a new target.
{userName} is right. If communications drop, the field team is blind.
Think of it like the grid. Break one key connection and every route changes.
*the warning alarm starts on the first syllable of Leonard's next sentence*
Missile locked onto the communication array. End distance: {endDistance}.
I will keep the network alive.
